usage: report_ccopt_cell_filtering_reasons [-help] [-cell_type {buffer inverter logic delay clock_gate flop latch}] [-clock_trees <string>] [-file <name>] [-power_domain <pd>] [-tcl_list]

options.name: -cell_type
options.description: {buffer inverter logic delay clock_gate flop latch} Restrict the report the specified lib cell type

options.name: -clock_trees
options.description: Restricts the report to the specified clock trees

options.name: -file
options.description: Save a copy of the contents of the report to the specified file name

options.name: -power_domain
options.description: Restricts the report to the specified power domain ((pd), optional)

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Returns the report as Tcl formatted data, and formats the -file as tcl if specified
